data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Session-level capacity controls', but there is no evidence provided that demonstrates this functionality being implemented or tested. The linked use case mentions the need for session-level capacity controls, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to capacity management for sessions. This indicates a clear gap in the implementation of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of session-level capacity controls being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Implement session-level capacity controls
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that session bookings respect defined capacity limits.
